product.name: Large Pendant Lighting, 17.7 inch,Natural Wood Cap, Adjustable Cord,Simple Modern Chandelier for Dining Room, Kitchen Table Matte White
features: Contemporary Design: This modern pendant lighting features a sleek drum design with a natural wood cap, adding a touch of elegance to your dining table or kitchen island.
Perfect Size: With a diameter of 17.7 inches, this pendant light is the perfect size to make a statement without overwhelming the space.
Matte White Finish: The matte white finish adds a clean and minimalist look to your space, complementing various decor styles.
Versatile Placement: Hang this light fixture above your dining table or kitchen island to create a focal point and provide functional lighting.

Easy Installation: This pendant light includes all necessary hardware and an adjustable cord up to 60 inch for effortless setup. Customize the hanging height to fit your space without extra tools or hassle
